data.name: Springfield

weaponImprint.name: Radiance
weaponImprint.trait: After healing, the user recovers 2 points of stability. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per turn.
weaponImprint.effect:
Hydro damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 5%. This unit's Max HP is increased by 15%/20%/25%/30%/35%/40%.

When actively healing a target, applies [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] to the target for 2 turns.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage against targets with Hydro debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage against Sycca Technologies units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: Gentle, strong, and understanding of others, she is a tactful and witty Doll who mingles well with different groups of people without allowing anyone to take advantage of her. Behind her tolerance lies an adherence to principles, that being Springfield's one and only principle—She shall always protect her friends and those who are important to her.

skills.name: Gentle Approach
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Eagle's Vigilance
skills.description:
At the end of Springfield's action, if Confectance Index is maxed out, expends all Confectance Index and gains [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

At the start of the turn, if HP is higher than 80%, Springfield gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns.

If the target [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following deals damage to an allied unit, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] on it, dealing Hydro damage equal to 20% of Springfield's Max HP and 1 point of stability damage and healing the allied unit for 20% of Springfield's Max HP. Can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

If [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is on the field, Springfield recovers HP equal to 20% of Max HP at the end of the action.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of Springfield's action, if Confectance Index is maxed out, expends all Confectance Index and gains [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

At the start of the turn, if HP is higher than 80%, Springfield gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns.

Hydro damage taken by the target which [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following and all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target is increased by 10%. If the target [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following deals damage to an allied unit, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] on it. If an allied unit performs an active attack to deal Hydro damage to the target [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Hydro damage equal to 20% of Springfield's Max HP and 1 point of stability damage and healing that allied unit for 20% of Springfield's Max HP. Can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

If [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is on the field, Hydro damage dealt by all allied units' out-of-turn attacks is increased by 40%. Springfield recovers 20% of Max HP at the end of the action.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the end of Springfield's action, if Confectance Index is maxed out, expends all Confectance Index and gains [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

At the start of the turn, if HP is higher than 80%, Springfield gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns.

Hydro damage taken by the target which [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] is following and all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target is increased by 10%. Before [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] makes an attack, applies [effect:ddc8a8fc-047a-4b1a-9acf-7f40c5a152b1] for 2 turns. If the target [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] is following deals damage to an allied unit, performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] on it. If an allied unit performs an active attack to deal Hydro damage to the target Taryz is following, Taryz performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Hydro damage equal to 40% of Springfield's Max HP and 2 points of stability damage and healing that allied unit 40% of Springfield's Max HP. Can be triggered up to 4 times per turn.

If [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] is on the field, Hydro damage dealt by all allied units' out-of-turn attacks is increased by 40%. Springfield recovers 20% of Max HP at the end of the action.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] gains new effects: Hydro damage taken by the target which [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following and all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target is increased by 10%. When [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is on the field, Hydro damage dealt by all allied units' out-of-turn attacks is increased by 40%.

Support effect added: When an allied unit performs an active attack to deal Hydro damage to the target [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Hydro damage equal to 20% of Springfield's Max HP and 1 point of stability damage and healing that allied unit for 20% of Springfield's Max HP. Can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
[effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is upgraded to [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2]. All multipliers for attacks by [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] are doubled. Hydro damage multipliers are increased by 20%, stability damage is increased by 1 point, HP recovery multiplier is increased by 20% and the effect can be triggered increases by 2 times per turn.

Before attacking, [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] applies [effect:ddc8a8fc-047a-4b1a-9acf-7f40c5a152b1] to the enemy target for 2 turns.

skills.name: Intel Manipulation
skills.description:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and applies [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to it for 2 turns, deals Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack to the target and applies [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] for 1 turn.

Springfield gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and applies [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to it for 2 turns, deals Hydro damage equal to 150% of attack, and applies [effect:569d48db-25a6-449e-8a41-dcc6c992745d] to it for 1 turn.

Springfield gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage dealt is increased to 150% of attack. When the enemy target entering Stability Break with [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] on self, Hydro damage taken is increased to 20%. [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] is changed to [effect:569d48db-25a6-449e-8a41-dcc6c992745d] for 1 turn.

skills.name: Opportune Assistance
skills.description:
Selects an allied unit within 9 tiles. Recovers HP equal to 100% of attack and 3 points of stability to the selected allied unit. Also, applies [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] for 2 rounds to the selected allied unit.

Springfield gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects an allied unit within 9 tiles. Recovers HP equal to 130% of attack and 3 points of stability to the selected allied unit. Also, applies [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] for 2 rounds and 6 stacks of [effect:79b35073-9f59-424e-ae5b-f60cbc6d7659] to the selected allied unit.

Springfield gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
HP recovery is increased to 130% of attack. The effect of [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] is increased, HP recovery is increased to 15% of attack. The maximum amount of converted enhancement to Hydro damage is increased to 70%.

In addition, applies 6 stacks of [effect:79b35073-9f59-424e-ae5b-f60cbc6d7659] to the selected unit.

skills.name: Path of Protection
skills.description:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and summons [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] to follow it for 2 rounds. Applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] and [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to the selected enemy target and all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target for 2 turns, and deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack.

Applies [effect:6bab9138-dfb9-425a-95bd-0ac4323936c8] and [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] to all allied units for 2 rounds. Recovers HP equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of stability, cleanses 1 debuff from them, and removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] from all allied units.

When the target that [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following dies, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] switches to following the enemy unit with the current highest HP.

Springfield gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and summons [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] to follow it for 2 rounds. Applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] and [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to the selected enemy target and all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target for 2 turns, and deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack.

Applies [effect:6bab9138-dfb9-425a-95bd-0ac4323936c8] and [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] to all allied units for 2 rounds. Recovers HP equal to 120% of attack and 6 points of stability, cleanses 2 debuffs and removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] from all allied units.

When the target that [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following dies, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] switches to following the enemy unit with the current highest HP.

Springfield gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and summons [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] to follow it for 3 rounds. Applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] and [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to the target and all enemy units within 4 tiles of the target for 2 turns, and deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack.

Applies [effect:6bab9138-dfb9-425a-95bd-0ac4323936c8] to all allied units for 3 rounds and [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] for 2 rounds. Recovers HP equal to 120% of attack and 6 points of stability, cleanses 2 debuffs and removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] from all allied units.

When the target that [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] is following dies, deals fixed damage to all enemy units within 4 tiles of the target equal to 40% of Springfield's attack and Taryz switches to following the enemy unit with the current highest HP.

Springfield gains 3 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Confectance Index gain increases by 1 point.

HP recovery is increased to 120% of attack, stability recovery is increased by 4 points, 1 additional debuff is cleansed. Additionally, removes [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Effect range increases by 1 tile.

[effect:6bab9138-dfb9-425a-95bd-0ac4323936c8] gains new effects: Damage taken is reduced by 15% and duration is increased by 1 round. The duration of [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] increases by 1 round, and when the target that [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following dies, deals fixed damage to all enemy units within 4 tiles of the target equal to 40% of Springfield's attack.

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, if stability is not full, gains [effect:090c0b74-752c-43bb-8018-88d47ba33511] for 1 turn.
When using the Ultimate skill Path of Protection, it pulls all targets 3 tiles toward the center of the effect.
Before making an active attack, Springfield cleanses 1 buff from the target.
When Taryz is on the field, all allied units' defense is increased by 10%.
If the target's HP is lower than 80%, healing effects are increased by 15%.
Before making an active attack, Springfield applies Hydro weakness for 1 turn.
When healing a target in Stability Break, recovers an additional 2 points of stability for the target.

vertebrae.effect:
HP recovery is increased to 130% of attack. The effect of [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] is increased, HP recovery is increased to 15% of attack. The maximum amount of converted enhancement to Hydro damage is increased to 70%.

In addition, applies 6 stacks of [effect:79b35073-9f59-424e-ae5b-f60cbc6d7659] to the selected unit.

doll.name: Springfield
doll.effects: Gentle, strong, and understanding of others, she is a tactful and witty Doll who mingles well with different groups of people without allowing anyone to take advantage of her. Behind her tolerance lies an adherence to principles, that being Springfield's one and only principle—She shall always protect her friends and those who are important to her.

Before [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] makes an attack, applies [effect:ddc8a8fc-047a-4b1a-9acf-7f40c5a152b1] for 2 turns. If the target [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] is following deals damage to an allied unit, performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] on it. If an allied unit performs an active attack to deal Hydro damage to the target Taryz is following, Taryz performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Hydro damage equal to 40% of Springfield's Max HP and 2 points of stability damage and healing that allied unit 40% of Springfield's Max HP. Can be triggered up to 4 times per turn.

If [effect:f63e08f3-bb50-4a10-8fa9-4219d4ef8fb2] is on the field, Hydro damage dealt by all allied units' out-of-turn attacks is increased by 40%. Springfield recovers 20% of Max HP at the end of the action.

vertebrae.effect: Damage dealt is increased to 150% of attack. When the enemy target entering Stability Break with [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] on self, Hydro damage taken is increased to 20%. [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] is changed to [effect:569d48db-25a6-449e-8a41-dcc6c992745d] for 1 turn.

doll.name: Springfield
doll.effects: Gentle, strong, and understanding of others, she is a tactful and witty Doll who mingles well with different groups of people without allowing anyone to take advantage of her. Behind her tolerance lies an adherence to principles, that being Springfield's one and only principle—She shall always protect her friends and those who are important to her.

skillsLevel2.name: Intel Manipulation
skillsLevel2.description:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and applies [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to it for 2 turns, deals Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack to the target and applies [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] for 1 turn.

Springfield gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

Effect range increases by 1 tile.

[effect:6bab9138-dfb9-425a-95bd-0ac4323936c8] gains new effects: Damage taken is reduced by 15% and duration is increased by 1 round. doll.effects: Gentle, strong, and understanding of others, she is a tactful and witty Doll who mingles well with different groups of people without allowing anyone to take advantage of her. skillsLevel3.name: Path of Protection
skillsLevel3.description:
Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and summons [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] to follow it for 2 rounds. Applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] and [effect:9e9015b2-0a66-4dcd-9eca-64a8b66b4721] to the selected enemy target and all enemy units within 3 tiles of the target for 2 turns, and deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack.

Applies [effect:6bab9138-dfb9-425a-95bd-0ac4323936c8] and [effect:e3ed8f2a-3665-4b7f-86ad-4b5a6b1807b3] to all allied units for 2 rounds. Recovers HP equal to 100% of attack and 2 points of stability, cleanses 1 debuff from them, and removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] from all allied units.

When the target that [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] is following dies, [effect:72babdbb-4889-4adb-a6f1-0ec11dbba1eb] switches to following the enemy unit with the current highest HP.

Springfield gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Hydro damage dealt by this unit, Hydro damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails: ﻿If the target Taryz is following deals damage to an allied unit, Taryz counterattacks and recovers HP for the allied unit. If an allied unit deals Hydro damage to the target Taryz is following, Taryz performs Support Action and recovers HP for the allied unit. When the target that Taryz is following dies, Taryz deals fixed damage to all enemy units within 4 tiles of the target equal to 40% of Springfield's attack and Taryz switches to following the enemy unit with the current highest HP.
Healing received is converted into an equal amount of fixed damage. Considered a Hydro debuff.
